'''pangudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oserskite|oserskite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ng-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oserskite|oserskite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pangudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pængidith|pængidith]] || [[word:pængidij|pængidij]] || [[word:pængidish|pængidish]] || [[word:pængidi|pængidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pangunguduth|pangunguduth]] || [[word:pangunguduj|pangunguduj]] || [[word:pangungudush|pangungudush]] || [[word:pangungudu|pangungudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:panguduth|panguduth]] || [[word:panguduj|panguduj]] || [[word:pangudush|pangudush]] || [[word:pangudu|pangudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pangufduth|pangufduth]] || [[word:pangufduj|pangufduj]] || [[word:pangufdush|pangufdush]] || [[word:pangufduf|pangufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:panguduthu|panguduthu]] || [[word:panguduju|panguduju]] || [[word:pangudushu|pangudushu]] || [[word:panguduku|panguduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:panguduth|panguduth]] || [[word:panguduj|panguduj]] || [[word:pangudush|pangudush]] || [[word:pangudu|pangudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:panguduthul|panguduthul]] || [[word:pangudujul|pangudujul]] || [[word:pangudushul|pangudushul]] || [[word:pangudukul|pangudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:panguduthuthu|panguduthuthu]] || [[word:pangudujuju|pangudujuju]] || [[word:pangudushushu|pangudushushu]] || [[word:panguduku|panguduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:panguduthun|panguduthun]] || [[word:pangudujun|pangudujun]] || [[word:pangudushun|pangudushun]] || [[word:pangudukun|pangudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:panguduthuoro|panguduthuoro]] || [[word:pangudujuoro|pangudujuoro]] || [[word:pangudushuoro|pangudushuoro]] || [[word:pangudukuoro|pangudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
